title: Project: Arkimedian
description: Create Factories and survive the wilderness of Ethenria Beta
body:
"The Universe rewards those seeking for life with life, those seeking for honor with honor and those seeking for riches, with riches of unbelievable worth" 

Richard Calvenile, CEO of the Arkimedian Authorization Association


# Development on this mod has been paused for now. I might create a remake at some point, but for now this wont get updates

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0yrV9XUwGCg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 

Hello Arkimedian. This is your first guide for your new job. Your Work-motto: "Enviromental destruction for the health of humanity". Your task is simple: produce as many products as possible and survive the dangerous widths of the Universe that await you. Lets get to the first point of this Guide:

![planets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/219c88f5b6c58cd38d327c2633762a40708da76a.png)

The Universe has much to offer, but your first mission only regards one planet:

ETHENRIA BETA    ![ethenria_beta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084c2a18eedda2648106754926debd137d8a3294.png)

The name of this planet is derived from the trinith´y word "Enthisiel" that meant "earth". Its warm, Rainforest-like climate was deemed perfect for the first arkimedian landing sites. Its natural resources include: Iron, Copper, Oil, Aluminium and Ceramite. Registered lifeforms are: Synrias and little furry creatures that werent named yet. Be aware that synrias are Hunter class Carnivores. If you dont know what that means, it means they are most probably going to try to prey on you

![factories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00c6ef921c47e01efc812f82fe89c61e1c10ae26.png)

Those are your actual mission. The Arkimedian Authorization Association did not send you on a vacation on Ethenria Beta. You are there because you have a mission. And that mission includes building factories. The way you construct them was held extremely simple by using modular designs that can be adapted to any enviroment.

This list is a short overview of the most important parts:

The Constructioncore:

This core is able to craft many different items

which are required to progress in your mission.

 

The Smelter: 

A basic core to smelt raw ores into usable ingots.

Remember to add Exhausts on top.

 

The recipes for everything are contained in a cloud that automatically uploads them to new constructors once they have been well, constructed.

 

Now you just have to initiate the launch protocols and your mission will be officially started
